} function BreakStatement(node) { this.word("break"); printStatementAfterKeyword(this, node.label); } function ContinueStatement(node) { this.word("continue"); printStatementAfterKeyword(this, node.label); } function ReturnStatement(node) { this.word("return"); printStatementAfterKeyword(this, node.argument); } function ThrowStatement(node) { this.word("throw"); printStatementAfterKeyword(this, node.argument); this.space(); if (node.handlers) { this.print(node.handlers[0]); } else { this.print(node.handler); } if (node.finalizer) { this.space(); this.word("finally"); this.space(); this.print(node.finalizer);
